note: Starter Blue Mantis outcome library. Final list pending from the practice; replace this file (bump version) to update. Copied into engagement-scoped Outcome rows on engagement creation.

outcomes.name: Identity and MFA
outcomes.description: User identity, single sign-on, multi-factor authentication, conditional access.

outcomes.name: Endpoint Security / EDR
outcomes.description: Endpoint detection and response, antivirus, threat protection on devices.

outcomes.name: Information Protection / DLP
outcomes.description: Data classification, labeling, data loss prevention.

outcomes.name: Threat Protection / XDR
outcomes.description: Extended detection and response across identity, email, endpoint, cloud.

outcomes.name: SIEM / SOAR
outcomes.description: Security information and event management, automated response.

outcomes.name: Secure Web Gateway / SSE
outcomes.description: Web filtering, secure access service edge, private access.

outcomes.name: File Storage and Sharing
outcomes.description: OneDrive, SharePoint document storage and sharing.

outcomes.name: Voice / Calling
outcomes.description: PSTN calling, phone system, contact center.

outcomes.name: eDiscovery and Compliance
outcomes.description: Legal hold, content search, audit, retention, insider risk.

outcomes.name: Backup and Recovery
outcomes.description: Backup of M365 data, point-in-time recovery.

outcomes.name: Privileged Access Management
outcomes.description: PAM, PIM, just-in-time elevation, secrets/password management.
